name: future-magnus-bos
description: Future Magnus Business OS — Monorepo root

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
